activities.execution_notes: Search results prepared and deduplicated. Video downloads blocked by YouTube rate limiting.

blocker.description: After ~20 successful video downloads for biweekly supercut, YouTube began rate-limiting requests. Subsequent attempts to download additional videos all failed with empty/corrupted files.
blocker.workaround: Use VPN with different exit IP (may violate YouTube ToS)
